news-global-econ.title: Small-town diner produces 5th lottery winner in 2 years as customer hits $2M jackpot
news-global-econ.description: Hometown hotspot Old South Diner in Nantucket has sold its fifth million-dollar lottery prize in two years, with Mary Haley winning a $2 million Powerball ticket.

news-global-econ.title: 'The View' hosts ask Rahm Emanuel if Trump started Iran war to distract from Epstein
news-global-econ.description: Iran war news dominates "The View" as Rahm Emanuel argues Trump made a "bad choice," warning the U.S. lacks a plan to reopen the Strait of Hormuz if Iran does not comply.

news-global-soc.title: Super Bowl heading back to Las Vegas as NFL confirms 2029 site
news-global-soc.description: The NFL has officially awarded Las Vegas Super Bowl LXIII in 2029, with Allegiant Stadium set to host the big game for the second time in five years.

news-global-soc.title: Sharon Stone blasts ‘blatant, harsh sexuality’ in modern TV, says she fast-forwards through sex scenes
